info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Appointment Scheduling API
info.description: The Appointment Scheduling API facilitates the creation and management of appointments within the system. Users can schedule new appointments, which are essential for managing time-sensitive interactions, bookings, or consultations. This API is particularly beneficial for service-based industries like healthcare, education, or customer support where appointment management is crucial. Typical consumers of this API include businesses that require efficient scheduling capabilities to optimize resource utilization and enhance customer experience.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new appointment using the provided details. Ensure all required fields are filled in the request body to successfully create the appointment.

requestBody.description: Provides the necessary details to create a new appointment. Ensure all required fields are correctly filled out to maintain data integrity and meet validation requirements.

200.description: Request completed successfully with appointment details.

400.description: Invalid input parameters provided in the request.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred on the server.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Operation Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the operation was performed.

status.description: The status code of the response.

error.description: Error message, if any occurred during the operation.

message.description: A general message about the operation.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path related to the operation.

suggestion.description: Additional suggestions or actions related to the operation.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Response schema for a successful appointment operation.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.title: Error Details

service.description: The name of the service that encountered the error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code that can be used for troubleshooting.

message.description: A message providing more context about the error.
message.example: Failed to create appointment due to server issues.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Error.description: Detailed information about the error, including service-specific data.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Bad Request Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code indicating the type of error.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace identifier for error tracking.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: Schema for the response body when a 400 Bad Request error occurs.

example.message: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

details.message: Database connection timeout while saving appointment details.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Appointment Request Body

patientId.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

doctorId.description: The unique identifier of the doctor for the appointment.

appointmentDate.description: The date of the appointment in ISO format.

appointmentTime.description: The time of the appointment in 24-hour format.

department.description: The department where the appointment will take place.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the request body for creating a new appointment, containing the necessary details about the patient, the doctor, and the appointment time.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.title: Error Response for Appointment Operations

timestamp.description: The time at which the error occurred.

status.description: The HTTP status code that represents the error state.

error.description: A short description of the error.

message.description: A detailed message describing the error.
message.example: Unable to process appointment request due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that generated the error.

trace.description: The stack trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A user-friendly suggestion to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createAppointment-Creat.description: This schema represents the structure of an error response returned when an appointment operation fails.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

Vary.description: Indicates which request headers will influence the caching behavior of the response.

Location.description: The URI that identifies the location of a newly created resource, used in response to HTTP POST requests.

content-type.description: The media type of the resource returned in the body of the response, indicating the format of the response content.
